# GOVERNED_CODEX_HANDOFF_PACKAGE_V1

This milestone introduces the first replay-certified downstream AI handoff
package for already-governed Codex task previews.

## Scope

- deterministic JSON handoff envelopes
- replay-visible export identity
- explicit operator approval requirement
- constitutional boundary metadata
- downstream execution disclaimer

## Boundary

The package is inert. It does not execute Codex, call APIs, invoke shell
commands, dispatch prompts, or create downstream authority.
